creator: tio.madrid@hotmail.com
text:
Pipelight 0.2.7.3_7 does not load wine-flash-installer due to expired PGP key.

"10 Dec 2014 03:47 CET  written by Pipelight Team: We are happy to announce Pipelight 0.2.8 which introduces some new features to increase the compatibility with Firefox. It is highly recommended to install this update since the previous PGP key which was used to sign the plugin database (install-dependency) expires on the 14th of december and otherwise you'll not be able to update plugins anymore after this date".
